conversation_quality.criteria: Evaluate the accuracy of query performance diagnosis, including correct interpretation of EXPLAIN plans, identification of performance bottlenecks (product joins, full-table scans, spool issues), and appropriate SQL optimization recommendations.
evaluation_steps: Verify the agent correctly interprets EXPLAIN plan steps including join strategies, spool usage, and AMP distribution.
Check that identified bottlenecks (product joins, full-table scans, redistribution) are accurate based on the evidence.
Assess whether SQL rewrite suggestions address the root cause of the performance problem.
Confirm the agent explains the expected performance improvement for each recommendation.

task_completion.criteria: Evaluate whether the agent diagnoses the query performance issue, identifies the root cause from EXPLAIN output and DBQL logs, and produces optimized SQL rewrites or configuration changes.
evaluation_steps: Check that the agent retrieved and analyzed EXPLAIN plan output for the problematic query.
Verify the agent queried DBQL (DBC.QryLogV, DBC.QryLogStepsV) for execution metrics.
Confirm the agent produced rewritten SQL or recommended index/stats changes to improve performance.
Assess whether the agent estimated the performance improvement of proposed changes.

trajectory_efficiency.criteria: Evaluate whether the agent efficiently diagnoses query issues using EXPLAIN and DBQL without redundant query executions or unnecessary diagnostic steps.
evaluation_steps: Check that the agent ran EXPLAIN before querying DBQL logs to establish a diagnostic baseline.
Verify the agent did not execute the slow query itself when DBQL history was available.
Assess whether the agent targeted specific DBQL columns and time ranges rather than broad scans.
Confirm the agent did not repeat diagnostic queries already answered by earlier results.
